milestoneTitle: Phase M9.18a — Dashboard fixed-slot tile grammar, Learn panel wired first. New .dash-tile component replaces .continue-row inside the Dashboard Learn panel (body #dash-learn-body). Fixed slots: leading grab (28px, invisible on dashboard), content (title + eyebrow), trailing cluster (duration chip 40px + state pill 84px top row, pin + mastery + delete 24px each bottom row). Duration "7m" finally has a permanent spot; state pill says Start/Continue/Done; pin + mastery toggles work inline and re-render both the dashboard panel and the Learn list through the shared [data-learn-action] delegation. Delete + grab slots are reserved (invisible) to keep geometry identical with future Projects/Tools tiles. Phase-1 step 1 of 3 — M9.18b wires Projects dashboard panel next, M9.18c Tools. Plan: ~\.claude\plans\ok-lets-work-on-quiet-gadget.md.
